prompt: Generate an interview guide for understanding how mid-market companies currently handle their onboarding process for new team members. We're considering building a team onboarding feature.
assertions: Guide follows four-segment structure (Opening, Warm-up, Core Discovery, Wrap-up)
Questions ask about past behaviour, not hypothetical futures
No mention of the proposed onboarding feature in the first half of the guide
Note-taking template includes Key observations, Notable quotes, Surprises, Follow-up questions
Guide specifies participant criteria and target sample size
